command: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p logs/arc4_gpu/arc4_b1_collect/workers; pids=(); for i in 0 1 2 3; do python scripts/b1_pertoken_collect.py --manifest data/manifests/phase1_manifest_frozen.json --clips-root /XYFS02/HDD_POOL/paratera_xy/pxy1289/HaocunYe/Research/SoundDecisions/data/FoleyBench/clips --out results/arc4_b1 --certified results/stage_m_rerun/certified_kernels.json --cfg 1.0 --schedule sqrt_down --variant small_16k --duration 8 --num-steps 20 --seed 0 --n-independent 16 --shard "$i/4" --device "cuda:$i" > "logs/arc4_gpu/arc4_b1_collect/workers/shard${i}.log" 2>&1 & pids+=("$!"); done; rc=0; for p in "${pids[@]}"; do wait "$p" || rc=1; done; test "$rc" -eq 0; python scripts/b1_pertoken_collect.py --manifest data/manifests/phase1_manifest_frozen.json --out results/arc4_b1 --aggregate

placement.rationale: small_16k fits TP1; four independent replicas maximize throughput
